73868.subject: 🚨 Action needed: Your Deployment may go offline
73868.body: Your Emergent Subscription body { margin: 0; padding: 0; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; background-color: #fafafa; } .email-container { max-width: 560px; margin: 0 auto; background-color: #ffffff; padding: 50px 40px; } .content { color: #1a1a1a; line-height: 1.7; } .greeting { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; margin: 0 0 32px 0; color: #1a1a1a; } .message { font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px; color: #1a1a1a; } .cta-container { margin: 32px 0; } .cta-link { color: #0066cc; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; } .cta-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .signature { font-size: 16px; margin: 32px 0; color: #1a1a1a; } .footer { font-size: 13px; color: #999; padding-top: 30px; border-top: 1px solid #eaeaea; line-height: 1.6; } .footer-address { margin-bottom: 12px; } .unsubscribe { color: #666; text-decoration: none; } .unsubscribe:hover { text-decoration: underline; } @media only screen and (max-width: 600px) { .email-container { padding: 40px 24px; } } Hey there, Quick update on your website. You currently have a live deployment running on Emergent, and your credits have dipped below 0. If you have an active subscription , you're all good since your credits will auto-replenish soon. Just a heads up if your subscription hasn't been renewed - Active deployments use a small monthly maintenance fee of 50 credits, similar to any hosting service. As builders ourselves, we know how much effort goes into a build. So we'll keep your deployment live for the next 15 days. After that, your app will be taken offline unless credits are replenished. To avoid any interruptions, top up your credits below. Top Up Now → Thanks for building with us. Team Emergent Emergent Labs 2380 Via Espada Pleasanton, CA 94566-5840 USA Unsubscribe

73865.subject: 💰 The Funding: How crypto hedge funds are navigating weak markets
73865.body:
As crypto markets remain weak, fund managers say asset selection, fundamentals, and alpha matter more than ever.

The Funding ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by Yogita Khatri | Edited by Zack Abrams

Happy Sunday, and welcome to the 52nd edition of The Funding!

Earlier this year, I spoke with crypto liquid and hedge fund managers after bitcoin's sharp selloff ( https://www.theblock.co/post/388978/the-funding-crypto-liquid-funds-respond-to-the-bitcoin-crash?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ). Markets have remained weak since then, with many investors still waiting for stronger momentum to return.

So I checked back in with fund managers and analysts to see how the industry has performed, what's working, what's not, and what they expect next.

Let's dive in.

*THE INSIDE VIEW*

*How crypto hedge funds are navigating a tough market*

So far in 2026, the market has remained difficult for crypto liquid and hedge funds ( https://www.theblock.co/post/388978/the-funding-crypto-liquid-funds-respond-to-the-bitcoin-crash?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ). Bitcoin remains well below its October highs, perpetual futures open interest ( https://www.theblock.co/data/crypto-markets/futures?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) has fallen, and DeFi activity ( https://www.theblock.co/data/decentralized-finance/total-value-locked-tvl?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) has slowed. But several investors and analysts said the industry is becoming more mature and far more selective. *Andy Martinez, founder and CEO of Crypto Insights Group* , said the gap between top- and bottom-quartile fund managers continues to widen, while *Ray Hindi, co-founder and managing partner of L1D* , described the current environment as "healthy for a very few [funds] and very tough for most."

One reason for that growing gap is asset selection. *Ryan Watkins, co-founder of Syncracy Capital* , said passive exposure to major crypto assets has generally not worked well this year, while concentrated exposure to a small number of outperformers such as Hyperliquid's HYPE has. "I can't share our returns, but it's been a great year for us so far," Watkins said. *Richard Galvin, executive chairman and chief investment officer at Digital Asset Capital Management* , similarly said holding tokens such as Hyperliquid, Morpho, and Zcash has been one of the key factors separating strong performers from the rest of the market.

The market is increasingly rewarding fundamentals ( https://www.theblock.co/post/351325/crypto-liquid-funds-down-bad-shifting-to-quality-tokens?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) rather than broad market exposure. Hindi said managers focused on idiosyncratic opportunities have generally perfor

73860.subject: Should you use a sleep tracker?
73860.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4OTN9AAcAAAAAAh1PlDVvkgTYvTjey77MN8GNcpWosc_s0MhiOo8TxXD3Wl4xAjFjH4HZZHLkfRcUT32b51W6zKLB4QQrv89HfZHGYR_UY_NIPjr9KCS2678boQ 

May 31st 2026

 

 
 
 

 The Economist Today
 


 A Sunday edition of our daily newsletter
 


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4OTN9AAcAAAAAAh1PlDVwvBnNpGmyyeeIXpUdl3LZkQqG1AcyAMLQ5U35q77NiLoPllOrMRkhe7300aGJteneRQjWXFiq72LDAxsKkmmjz2Wee3IRjstQcVtKDQ 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4OTN9AAcAAAAAAh1PlDVxDlLQ4HcHc2o4pCIX08x5HKzVKBlGEDx1QoHsH7n3F52egRYUcHXXbnw4IWVbjF8j-8WpT6RjJDXynkmYBAOdtD2fbr9qUazmmZW_6g 



 
 

Annie Crabill

Senior digital editor



 An ideal Sunday ends with a great night’s sleep. Trackers—smartwatches, smart rings, phone apps—can tell you 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4OTN9AAcAAAAAAh1PlDVykokkhPn8mbPnymIZApHEzX8VDXCV3cexllCtLU981GUEDh9Una3giekF5pdOq2JWtwg5JBtMOnWkam7WTCE6nnVqTHp9Mkax 
how much shut-eye 
 you actually got, and perhaps log how long you spent in different sleep stages. But more data has downsides: fretting about rest is one of the most common causes of a sleepless night.


 This week ExxonMobil’s shareholders voted to cut ties with New Jersey and reincorporate in Texas. The oil major is only the latest company to shift its headquarters to the Lone Star State. From Dallas’s “Y

73854.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest - May 31
73854.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-may-31-oleh-bezuhlyi-5kz1f?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3Bxd3hGqueQdmG0L4BF4vFRA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1mfMeGV9t3Lsg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mptyz4dl~kk-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mptyz4dl-kk
  
🧠 AI’s Crypto News Brief: Market sentiment is dominated by major regulatory shifts as the Trump administration officially kills the U.S. CBDC. While the FBI executes a record $8B seizure, institutional friction grows over the landmark Clarity Act's stablecoin provisions. 🚨FBI Executes Record $8 Billion Crypto Seizure in "Operation Blackout" The FBI has dismantled a global fraud network, seizing over 127,000 Bitcoin worth approximately $8 billion from Prince Holding Group CEO Chen Zhi. This marks the largest crypto forfeiture in U.S. history, recovering funds tied to Southeast Asian trafficking and scam compounds. Read full story 🏛️Trump Administration Officially Rejects U.S. Central Bank Digital Currency President Trump has fulfilled a campaign promise by formally killing plans for a U.S. CBDC, citing concerns over government surveillance and financial privacy. The move cements a policy shift toward private stablecoin infrastructure rather than a state-controlled digital dollar. See details 🏦JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon Vows to Fight "Clarity Act" Over Stablecoin Interest JPMorgan’s Jamie Dimon has launched a fierce opposition to the Clarity Act, specifically targeting provisions that allow crypto firms to pay interest on stablecoin deposits. Banks argue the bill creates unfair regulatory disparities by bypassing traditional reserve requirements. Read full story 🌐Cardano Foundation Cancels 2026 Global Summit Following Treasury Vote The Cardano Foundation has officially canceled its upcoming 2026 summit after a community governance vote for treasury funding fell just short of the required threshold. The decision highlights the growing pains of decentralized governance in managing large-scale ecosystem events. See details ⚖️SEC Sues Privvy Founder Over $12.3 Million AI-Driven Crypto Scheme The SEC has filed a lawsuit against the founder of Privvy, alleging an investment scheme where "AI trading bots" were found to be non-existent. The regulator claims the project defrauded investors of $12.3 million by leveraging artificial intelligence hype to mask a traditional Ponzi structure. Read full story 🏗️Ethereum "Glamsterdam" Hard Fork Set to Triple Network Speed in 2026 Ethereum developers have confirmed the "Glamsterdam" upgrade roadmap, aiming to increase Layer 1 speeds to 10,000 transactions per second. This hard fork is positioned as
